posts.author: FirstCert (Mattias Strand)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would like function of choosing not only a date in the calendar. I would like to be able to pick specific days, like this is for our “Tuesday meeting”, or “this is the points we discuss during the meeting i Mars”, or this activity is for the year 2026. And when tuesday, mars or 2026 passes, it would be status “Late”.

What are you trying to achieve

Would make planning easier, I can sort on assignments for at specific month, without selecting the whole month from the 1st to last date, or I have a 4 year contract with different activites during the 1st, 2nd, 3rd year ect. Easy to just set “2027” for the planning. This function also helps to bulild dashboard functions.
